interpretation: After mechanical fixes, strict coverage@5=0.20 understates retrieval (judge false-negatives); calibrated=0.44. Residual is ~49% corpus-gap + ~30% metric-artifact + ~12% chunking + ~9% embedding => only ~17% of questions are retrieval-architecture-fixable; ~39% are content absent from docs. Not an embedding ceiling — a corpus-coverage + measurement story.
